type.description: What kind of project: pi-extension, swift-app, python-lib, rust-crate, etc.

framework.description: Framework if applicable: swiftui, django, actix, etc.

sources.description: Where these principles come from: docs, style guides, SDK, examples

id.description: Stable identifier: P1, P2, type-safety, error-handling, etc.

rules.description: Concrete, checkable rules under this principle

id.description: Stable rule ID: P1.1, P1.2, etc.

check_method.description: How to verify compliance: grep (pattern match), command (run tool), ast (parse tree), inspect (LLM judgment)

check_pattern.description: Grep pattern or command to run for automated checking

examples.description: Correct usage examples (code snippets or references)

severity.description: Default severity when this rule is violated
